response.justification: Bogdan has a broad engineering background spanning roughly 17 years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, and shows entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective, but he falls well short of the Principal/Director-level AI Strategy role requirements. His AI experience is entirely nascent — limited to MCP tooling work since April 2025 at a small firm — with no track record of building or shipping AI-powered products at scale. He lacks an advanced degree in AI/ML, has no cloud platform strategy background, and shows no evidence of the director-level individual contributor scope, enterprise advisory capacity, or recognized AI expertise the role demands.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and high-throughput infrastructure
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as founder of GISCollective and consistent open-source platform contributions
Active knowledge-sharing through conference talks and multi-day workshops, indicating communication skills and a learning-leadership orientation
concerns: AI/agentic experience is brand new (April 2025 only) with no prior demonstrated AI products or platforms at meaningful scale
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or a related field, and no recognized industry standing in AI/ML
No evidence of director-level IC scope, cloud platform strategy, or enterprise customer advisory work that this role requires

key_factors.factor: Absence of cloud strategy and director-level scope
Breadth and longevity of engineering experience
